rationale: The citing paper uses Erdem and Sun (2002) as a key prior study in the spillover literature, not just as a passing citation. It repeatedly contrasts prior umbrella-brand/common-brand spillovers (including Erdem and Sun) with its own focus on spillovers across directly competing brands, and uses this contrast to define its research gap and contribution. It also refers to Erdem and Sun when discussing spillover modeling choices (e.g., alternative parameterization and direct advertising spillover ideas), which informs the citing paper's conceptual and model setup.
relation_description: The 2009 paper extends the line of work represented by Erdem and Sun (2002) by moving spillover analysis from umbrella-brand settings to competing brands without a shared brand name. It develops and tests new prior and dynamic competitive spillover mechanisms while positioning them against the earlier umbrella-brand spillover framework.
